api_token.description: Printify personal access token, sent as Authorization: Bearer <api_token>. Never logged.

base_url.description: Printify API root URL override for tests or proxies. Paths include /v1 or /v2.

shop_id.description: Printify shop ID for shop-scoped streams and writes.

blueprint_id.description: Catalog blueprint ID for blueprint detail, print-provider, variant, and shipping streams.

print_provider_id.description: Print provider ID for provider detail and blueprint/provider subresource streams.

product_id.description: Product ID for product detail streams.

order_id.description: Order ID for order detail streams.

image_id.description: Uploaded image ID for upload detail streams.

webhook_id.description: Webhook ID for webhook write actions.

show_out_of_stock.description: Optional catalog variants out-of-stock flag; use the API documented value 0 or 1.
